test.template:
Run the full Flutter test suite with coverage.
!`flutter test --coverage`
Analyze results and suggest fixes for any failures.

build.template:
Build the Flutter app for Android.
!`flutter build apk --release`
Report the result and any errors encountered.

analyze.template:
Run Flutter static analysis on the codebase.
!`flutter analyze`
List all issues found and suggest fixes for each.

fix.template:
Apply automatic fixes and format the codebase.
!`dart fix --apply`
!`dart format .`
Report what was changed.

clean.template:
Clean the Flutter project and rebuild dependencies.
!`flutter clean && flutter pub get`
Report the result.

check.template:
Run a full health check on the project.
!`flutter doctor -v`
!`flutter pub outdated`
!`flutter analyze`
Summarize the project health status.
